paper_title: DialoGPT: Large-Scale Generative Pre-training for Conversational Response Generation

raw_extraction.innovation: Extends GPT-2 with large-scale dialogue-specific pre-training on Reddit data, addressing challenges like content consistency and informativeness in conversational response generation.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: 147M conversation-like exchanges extracted from Reddit comment chains (2005–2017)
raw_extraction.application: Conversational agents, chatbots, open-domain dialogue systems, response generation
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (source code and pre-trained model released under proprietary terms with restrictions)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Generating contextually consistent, informative, and realistic conversational responses
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on dialogue generation tasks (e.g., DSTC-7, Reddit multi-reference)
raw_extraction.paper_title: DialoGPT: Large-Scale Generative Pre-training for Conversational Response Generation

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of DIALOGPT with improved performance on content consistency and relevance, incorporating maximum mutual information (MMI) re-ranking for higher-quality responses.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: 147M conversation-like exchanges extracted from Reddit comment chains (2005–2017)
raw_extraction.application: Conversational agents, chatbots, open-domain dialogue systems, response generation
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (source code and pre-trained model released under proprietary terms with restrictions)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Generating contextually consistent, informative, and realistic conversational responses
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on dialogue generation tasks (e.g., DSTC-7, Reddit multi-reference)
raw_extraction.extension: Includes Maximum Mutual Information (MMI) re-ranking to improve response diversity and relevance by penalizing repetitive or bland hypotheses.
raw_extraction.paper_title: DialoGPT: Large-Scale Generative Pre-training for Conversational Response Generation

raw_extraction.innovation: Largest variant of DIALOGPT, demonstrating superior performance in capturing long-term dependencies and generating coherent, contextually aware responses.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: 147M conversation-like exchanges extracted from Reddit comment chains (2005–2017)
raw_extraction.application: Conversational agents, chatbots, open-domain dialogue systems, response generation
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (source code and pre-trained model released under proprietary terms with restrictions)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Generating contextually consistent, informative, and realistic conversational responses
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on dialogue generation tasks (e.g., DSTC-7, Reddit multi-reference)
raw_extraction.paper_title: DialoGPT: Large-Scale Generative Pre-training for Conversational Response Generation

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces adversarial information maximization (MMI) to enhance diversity and relevance in conversational responses while maintaining coherence.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Generating coherent, relevant, and diverse conversational responses in open-domain dialogues
raw_extraction.extension: Adversarial Information Maximization (MMI) improves response diversity and relevance compared to standard beam search.
raw_extraction.paper_title: DialoGPT: Large-Scale Generative Pre-training for Conversational Response Generation

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of DialoGPT with improved performance in multi-turn dialogue generation through larger parameter count.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Generating coherent, relevant, and diverse conversational responses in open-domain dialogues
raw_extraction.paper_title: DialoGPT: Large-Scale Generative Pre-training for Conversational Response Generation
